title: Forgemized
description: Forgemized: the forge modpack that pushes FPS to the limits
body:
**Forgemized**

Experience Minecraft like never before with Forgemized, the epitome of optimization in a forge modpack. Engineered for unparalleled performance, every aspect of Forgemized has been meticulously fine-tuned to push your FPS to new heights. Say goodbye to lag and hello to smooth, immersive gameplay as you explore a world where performance knows no bounds. Download now and forge your path to gaming excellence with Forgemized.

**Mod List:**

- AI-Improvements
- Alternate Current
- Canary
- Cloth Config
- Clumps
- CullLessLeaves-Reforged
- DimThread
- DynView
- Embeddium
- EmbeddiumPlus
- ImmediatelyFast
- EntityCulling-Forge
- Entity Collision FPS Fix-Forge
- Fabric API
- FastFurnace
- FastSuite
- FastWorkbench
- FerriteCore
- ForgetMeChunk
- KryptonReforged
- LazyDFU
- LetMeDespawn
- Lightspeed
- Log-Begone-Forge
- MemoryLeakFix-Forge
- ModernFix-Forge
- Placebo
- Radon
- Reforgium
- Rubidium Extra
- Rubidium_Extras
- Saturn
- SmoothBoot(Reloaded)
- Starlight
- Textrues_embeddium_options
